cancel.cardDeclinedDesc: Check if the card details are correct and if there's available credit. Some banks may block international purchases - contact your bank if necessary.

settings.name: Name

settings.acceptedFormats: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG or WEBP. Max size 2MB.
settings.appInstalledDesc: You are already running the optimized version with offline support and instant loading.
settings.appInstallPromptDesc: Install the platform on your device for a native full-screen experience, enhanced offline support, instant startup, and lower data consumption.
settings.alreadyLatestVersion: You already have the latest version of the application!
settings.avatarMaxSizeError: The image must be a maximum of 5MB.
settings.installGuideSubtitle: Follow the instructions below to install on your device
settings.installIosStep1: Open the platform in the Safari browser.
settings.installIosStep2: Tap the Share button (square with arrow pointing up in the bottom bar).
settings.installIosStep3: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen".
settings.installIosStep4: Confirm by tapping Add in the top corner.
settings.installDesktopDesc: Click the Install icon (a computer screen with a down arrow) on the right side of your browser's address bar, next to the bookmarks star.
settings.installAndroidStep1: Tap the three dots button in the top right corner of Chrome.
settings.installAndroidStep2: Select the option "Install app" or "Add to home screen".

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Learn about CodeEngine 1
about.heroSubtitle: CodeEngine 1 is more than a digital content platform. We are a premium ecosystem dedicated to empowering professionals through high-quality knowledge in technology and artificial intelligence.
about.missionDesc: Democratize access to premium knowledge in technology and AI, empowering professionals to reach their full potential.
about.visionDesc: To be the leading platform for high-quality digital content, recognized for excellence and constant innovation.
about.valuesDesc: Excellence, innovation, accessibility, and commitment to the professional transformation of our members.
about.curatedContentDesc: Each material is carefully selected and validated by industry experts.
about.premiumCommunityDesc: Be part of an exclusive community of technology and AI professionals.
about.globalAccessDesc: Learn at your own pace, from anywhere in the world, with always updated content.
about.manifestoP1: We believe that knowledge is the greatest asset of the digital age. In a world where technology evolves exponentially, access to quality content should not be a privilege, but a right.
about.manifestoP2: We built this platform with the vision of creating an ecosystem where professionals, students, and enthusiasts can find the best resources to accelerate their learning journey.
about.manifestoP3: Every ebook, every guide, every material available here has been carefully curated to ensure you have access to the most relevant and up-to-date content in the world of technology and AI.
about.manifestoP4: Together, we are building the future of digital learning.
about.readyToStartDesc: Join thousands of professionals who are already transforming their careers with our premium content.

questions.q: How do I access my products?
questions.a: After purchase, access the member area and go to "My Purchases". All your products will be available for download.
Yes, we offer a 7-day guarantee. Contact us within this period to request a refund.
Yes! All products are regularly updated and you receive updates for free.
We offer support via email and WhatsApp. Premium members have priority support with response within 12 hours.
